Home / Strings / Dominant Violin Strings with Perlon E

Dominant Violin Strings with Perlon E

$14.82 – $88.84Price range: $14.82 through $88.84

Clear
SKU: N/A Categories: Violin strings, Thomastik-Infeld strings, Strings
  • Description
  • Additional information

Description

The DOMINANT string is a highly flexible, multi-strand synthetic core string for tonal warmth and feel of gut and is impervious to changes in humidity, allowing for stable intonation and long life. The sound is soft, clear and rich in overtones.

Dominant strings, widely recognised as “the reference standard”, are legendary for distinctive tone and playability.

 

The strings are made of the following materials;

E string (130) : Steel core, aluminium wound, ball end

A string (131) : Synthetic core, aluminium wound

D string (132) : Synthetic core, aluminium wound

G string (133) : Synthetic core, silver wound

Additional information

String

Set, E Perlon
